name: melodic
description: Melodic — a fast, Typora-style live-rendering markdown editor

scripts.build: esbuild renderer/js/app.js --bundle --minify --format=iife --outfile=renderer/dist/app.bundle.js && esbuild renderer/js/katex-entry.js --bundle --minify --format=iife --outfile=renderer/dist/katex.bundle.js && esbuild renderer/js/hljs-entry.js --bundle --minify --format=iife --outfile=renderer/dist/hljs.bundle.js
scripts.pack: npm run build && electron-packager . Melodic --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=dist-app --overwrite --icon=build/icon.icns --app-bundle-id=com.local.melodic --extend-info=build/info.plist && npm run sign
scripts.sign: codesign --force --deep --sign - dist-app/Melodic-darwin-arm64/Melodic.app && codesign --verify --deep --strict dist-app/Melodic-darwin-arm64/Melodic.app && echo 'signature OK'
